'''Galactic Recreational Equipment Industries''' was a leisure and fitness equipment manufacturer and sales outlet. They were a subsidiary of [[MK Enterprises]], and by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], had 13,387 retail outlets across the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
